cmd:
bash -c 
  cmake -S projects/kaldifeat/src -B projects/kaldifeat/src/build     -DPYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/conda/envs/py_3.12/bin/python     -Dkaldifeat_BUILD_TESTS=ON     -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release 2>&1 | grep -E 'Standard|CXX_STANDARD|ROCm|HIP|error:|-- ' | tail -30

bash -c 
  cd projects/kaldifeat/src
  HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=4,5   PYTHONPATH=$PWD/kaldifeat/python:$PWD/build/lib   ctest --test-dir build --output-on-failure 2>&1

bash -c 
  cd projects/kaldifeat/src
  HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=2   PYTHONPATH=$PWD/kaldifeat/python:$PWD/build/lib   ctest --test-dir build --output-on-failure 2>&1

bash -c 
PYI=/opt/conda/envs/py_3.12/bin/python
cmake -S projects/kaldifeat/src -B projects/kaldifeat/src/build \
  -DPYTHON_EXECUTABLE=$PYI -Dkaldifeat_BUILD_TESTS=ON -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \
  2>&1 | tail -30
cmake --build projects/kaldifeat/src/build -j 2>&1 | tail -20
echo "BUILD_EXIT: $?"

bash -c 
export HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=3
export PYTHONPATH=/var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/kaldifeat/src/kaldifeat/python:/var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/kaldifeat/src/build/lib
PYI=/opt/conda/envs/py_3.12/bin/python

echo "=== ctest (C++ gtests + 10 python tests) ==="
ctest --test-dir /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/kaldifeat/src/build --output-on-failure 2>&1

echo "=== whisper tests ==="
$PYI /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/kaldifeat/src/kaldifeat/python/tests/test_whisper_fbank.py && echo "PASS test_whisper_fbank" || echo "FAIL test_whisper_fbank"
$PYI /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/kaldifeat/src/kaldifeat/python/tests/test_whisper_v3_fbank.py && echo "PASS test_whisper_v3_fbank" || echo "FAIL test_whisper_v3_fbank"
